description:
🛒 Shop our eBay store: https://www.ebay.com/str/shedflips
🔗 All our links (socials, member tier, etc.): https://linktr.ee/shedflips

Late Thursday night pack session — 14 eBay orders out the door before tomorrow's garage sales. Lonnie's $32 of complaining about Fiestaware plates, a corset that needed a creative mailer, a $79.99 Easton Press Steinbeck handled with extra care, and a $5 fill-a-bag haul that's already turned into $50 of sales. Hangout while we work!

📦 PACK RUNDOWN

0:00 — Thursday 6:45 PM, late start, garage sales tomorrow morning
1:03 — Lot of 25 35mm Movie Theater Trailers ($74.99) — UPS Ground, almost 22 lbs, headed to New York
5:35 — Red & Black Brocade Boned Corset ($22.49) — vinyl mailer trick to keep the boning intact
7:21 — I Love Lucy & Ethel Job Switching Barbie Pink Label ($29.99) — packed without the rough box to save weight
9:18 — Steinbeck "The Pearl / The Long Valley" Easton Press 1997 leather ($79.99) — the high-value book pack of the night
12:01 — Homer Laughlin FiestaWare Tangerine 4-piece Place Setting ($32.00) — also known as $32 of complaining about plates
25:00 — Encyclopedia of Cajun & Creole Cuisine 1983 1st Ed ($44.99) — yes, that's a coaster water stain
28:01 — Huge Lot of Buttons ($24.99) — straight out of the $5 fill-a-bag
30:46 — Dritz Collectible Keepsakes Chair Pin Cushion NIB ($24.99) — also from the fill-a-bag
33:51 — One more Easton Press leather we didn't even know we had, hiding spine-backward on the shelf

ALSO PACKED IN THIS RUN
- MMA Roman Coin Reversible Necklace + Clip Earrings ($62.99)
- Stakeout on Page Street & Other DKA Files — Joe Gores PB ($19.99)
- Stanley Nesting Two Cup Cookset ($20.99)
- Lot of 3 Skeins Bernat Blissful Yarn, Cream Marble ($11.99)
- Cry Baby DUCK YOU Plush Pendant Doll ($19.99)
- DAILY DOSE Miracle Moisture Leave-In Conditioner Full Case ($49.99)

Day's gross: about $520 across 14 packs.

Pack with us every week — Lonnie & Candice running fulfillment for the Shed Flips eBay store. Long-form, real-time, no montages.

#packwithus #ebayreseller #imgonnapackit #ebaypacking #orderfulfillment #resellerlife #lonnieandcandice

chapters.title: Thursday PM, late start, garage sales tomorrow morning

Steinbeck "The Pearl / The Long Valley" Easton Press 1997 leather ($79.99) — the high-value book pack of the night
Homer Laughlin FiestaWare Tangerine 4-piece Place Setting ($32.00) — also known as $32 of complaining about plates
Encyclopedia of Cajun & Creole Cuisine 1983 1st Ed ($44.99) — yes, that's a coaster water stain
Huge Lot of Buttons ($24.99) — straight out of the $5 fill-a-bag
Dritz Collectible Keepsakes Chair Pin Cushion NIB ($24.99) — also from the fill-a-bag
One more Easton Press leather we didn't even know we had, hiding spine-backward on the shelf

fulltitle: I Owe Candice an Apology — $32 of Plate Complaining #packwithus
